creator: flz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

My understanding is that you're overriding PREFIX to be able to pass a 
different value to configure's --prefix option than the default 
${PREFIX}. We could make this value default to ${PREFIX} if no value has 
been set already.  In any case, the fix you're offering is wrong and 
won't be committed.
